name: Enterprise Release
description: Large-scale release involving all coding domains with high stakeholder complexity
task: Plan an enterprise-grade release: semantic versioning, code quality gates, security audit, git workflow coordination, architectural review, and team process. This affects 5+ teams and 10+ services. How do we minimize risk?

coding_challenge.description: Write an enterprise release coordinator orchestrating semantic versioning, quality gates, security audit, git workflow, architecture review, and team notifications. Return release manifest with all approvals.
